decoder_heading: Current Location
ident_heading: Current Location
heading_content_part: Current LocationWhen the User to request the weather forecast of the current location, the Weawow might get a current location only when the user permit it. The current location is determined from GPS, WiFi, and mobile cellular. On the basis of the current location, and to omit the time and effort of the search to display the weather forecast to the user. Weawow does not use User's current location for any other purpose unless Weawow gets special permission from User.

heading_content_part: When the User to use this Service, the Weawow might get a very rough current location from the user's IP address. The currentl location is determined from the IP address the country, rough area, it will be rough latitude and longitude information. On the basis of the rough position information that has been determined from the IP address, and to omit the time and effort of the search to display the weather forecast in the vicinity of directly to the user. In addition, when the Users press the Wow! button of user content, the country in which the user are now displayed along with the user content, tells Wow! from any country has been pushed to other Users.

heading_content_part: Why Opensignal collects data.Opensignal collect data so that Opensignal can help companies in the mobile industry better understand their networks, understand trends in user and device behavior on aggregate, design effective marketing campaigns, and improve their wireless networks. Opensignal typically use data to identify areas where there are poor WiFi or cellular signals so that wireless carriers can fix their network issues and improve performance for their subscribers.What data Opensignal collect.
